# Charles Wood — UX Designer

> Product designer with a mechanical engineering background (CSWP,
> FEA/CFD/CAD). Specializing in data products, enterprise complexity, and
> AI-native design workflows. ~10 years of combined technical-product
> experience, including 6 years in product design.

## Case Studies

- [Enum](https://www.uxcharles.com/work/enum): Land-administration platform
  deployed for Zambia's national census. Sole UX designer. Dual tablet/web
  system for field capture (enumerators, offline-capable) and office
  verification (officials). Research conducted with stakeholders up to
  ministerial level.
- [Cashew](https://www.uxcharles.com/work/cashew): Payments platform and
  design system demonstration. Three-tier token architecture (primitives →
  semantic → component) with an integrated Figma-to-code pipeline using
  Tokens Studio and Storybook.
- [Trader](https://www.uxcharles.com/work/trader): Stock trading journal
  dashboard. Data-dense, numeric, expert-user interface.

## About

- [About](https://www.uxcharles.com/about): Full background, engineering
  credentials, tools, and experience overview.
